summary: @Ric_RTP: Microsoft just banned its own engineers from using AI. The tool was literally costing MORE than the humans it was suppos
whyItMatters: Microsoft just banned its own engineers from using AI. The tool was literally costing MORE than the humans it was supposed to replace. They lied to you about AI adoption and now the whole narrative is blowing up: Microsoft gave thousands of engineers access to Claude Code six months ago and encouraged them to use it. Engineers loved it and adoption exploded…
